ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "last_sale" REAL /* Last sale price of the company's stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year the company went public (IPO year) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "summary_quote" TEXT /* URL to the company's summary quote */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website URL */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Company's headquarters address */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Company's annual revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Parent industry ID (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the companies table */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening stock price on the specified date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest stock price on the specified date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest stock price on the specified date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing stock price on the specified date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
